overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City during golden hour. The character traverses sidewalks, crosses streets, moves through covered urban walkways with neon billboards, and ascends stairs to an elevated plaza. The environment features futuristic architecture, palm trees, and cyberpunk aesthetic with warm sunset lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: city sidewalk with palm trees and modern buildings

agents.ego_description: following a pedestrian in a brown jacket along the city sidewalk, maintaining steady pace

notable_agents.action: walking ahead of ego wearing a brown jacket and blue jeans, maintaining consistent distance

entered.detail: tall palm trees lining the street against the skyline
multi-story modern building with reflective glass windows
distinctive cylindrical futuristic building with illuminated sections
metal railing separating sidewalk from the street
tall skyscraper with dark facade on the right side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit city sidewalk during golden hour, with the camera following an NPC pedestrian. Tall palm trees and modern glass buildings frame the path, while a distinctive round futuristic tower dominates the distant skyline. The metal guardrail runs along the right side separating the walkway from the street.

events.description: pedestrian ahead exits frame to the right, ego continues straight alone
approaching intersection with visible traffic lights and crosswalk markings

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk toward the intersection after the pedestrian exits frame, preparing to cross

entered.detail: road intersection with traffic signals and crosswalk markings
traffic signal suspended over the intersection
zebra crossing markings on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: After the pedestrian exits the frame, the character continues alone toward a sunlit intersection. The crosswalk and traffic lights come into view as the character approaches the street crossing. The palm trees shift to the left side as the perspective opens up to the wide intersection.

events.description: crossing the street from open sidewalk into covered walkway area
turning right to enter the covered walkway beneath the overpass structure

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and turning right into a covered walkway beneath the overpass, navigating around bollards

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the street parallel to the crosswalk

entered.detail: large multi-level parking structure with open concrete floors
illuminated advertising screen on the parking garage facade
street sign reading 'Pacific Blvd' mounted on building column
elevated highway or monorail track running above the street
sidewalk covered by the overpass structure with tiled flooring

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street and turns right into a covered walkway beneath an overpass. A futuristic car passes on the right as the character enters the sheltered area. The Pacific Blvd sign becomes visible on the left, and large digital billboards illuminate the parking garage on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with digital advertising displays

events.description: entering deep shadow of overpass, lighting shifts to artificial neon and billboard illumination
passing pedestrians sitting on bench temporarily blocks left side of view

agents.ego_description: walking beneath the overpass with large digital billboards overhead, passing other pedestrians on the left

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench against the wall beneath the billboards

entered.detail: massive curved digital advertising screens mounted on the overpass ceiling
horizontal red neon light strip running along the building facade

segments.scene_description: Walking deeper under the overpass, the natural sunlight fades and the environment is illuminated by massive digital billboards overhead and neon light strips. The character passes a pedestrian sitting on a bench to the left. The covered walkway continues with tiled flooring beneath the concrete structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark underpass beneath building with stair access

events.description: entering darker underpass beneath the building, away from the covered walkway
beginning ascent of wide concrete stairs leading upward

agents.ego_description: walking through a dark underpass and beginning to ascend a flight of concrete stairs toward the light

entered.detail: dark concrete tunnel beneath the building with graffiti on walls
wall covered in colorful graffiti and street art
wide flight of concrete stairs with metal railings leading upward
multi-story parking structure with distinctive horizontal stripes visible through the underpass

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker, narrower underpass beneath the building, leaving the neon-lit walkway behind. Graffiti covers the walls to the left. Ahead, a wide flight of concrete stairs leads upward, with a striped parking garage visible through the opening to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated plaza with trees overlooking the city

events.description: emerging from dark underpass into bright golden hour sunlight at the top of stairs
reaching the top of stairs and entering the open plaza with vegetation

agents.ego_description: finishing the stair ascent and emerging into a sunlit plaza with trees and view of the city skyline

entered.detail: mature trees with green foliage in the elevated plaza area
open paved plaza surface with geometric patterns
elevated highway or transit bridge visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the dark underpass into bright golden hour sunlight at the top of the stairs. The scene opens into an elevated plaza with trees and paved ground, offering a view of the city skyline and an overpass bridge in the distance. The lighting shifts dramatically from artificial darkness to warm natural sunlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sunlit city sidewalk through a series of shadowed urban underpasses, finally emerging into a bright elevated plaza. It begins by following a pedestrian past palm trees and glass buildings toward a wide intersection, where the perspective opens up as the character approaches a street crossing. As the character crosses the road, the scene shifts from open sunlight into a covered walkway beneath an overpass, where the natural light fades and is replaced by the glow of massive digital billboards and neon strips. The camera then moves deeper into a dark, graffiti-covered underpass, passing a narrow corridor before ascending a wide flight of concrete stairs. Finally, the character emerges from the artificial darkness back into the warm golden hour sunlight, opening onto a paved plaza with a sweeping view of the city skyline and a distant overpass bridge.
